hero.title: Quality & Compliance
hero.description: In B2B, quality is not a nice-to-have - it is the cost of staying in business. Our approach is built around consistent batches, documented checkpoints, and destination-market readiness.

cards.title: Quality Control Process
cards.description: IQC to IPQC to FQC/OQC workflows designed to prevent hidden defects.

cards.title: Reliability Testing
cards.description: Drop, vibration, aging, and key-press cycle checks to reduce returns.

cards.title: Certifications & Compliance
cards.description: Planning for CE, RoHS, FCC pathways and destination labeling.

highlight: We provide decision-ready materials: spec sheets, packaging specs, inspection checklists, and clear revision control.

primary.title: Request Quality Documentation Checklist
primary.description: Tell us your target market, quantity, and customization needs. We respond within 24 hours with a practical checklist and next steps.

secondary.title: Request Samples
secondary.description: Verify fit, finish, and performance before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
